message:
test(comparison): add unit tests for minhash-cache, comparison-engine, hgt-tracer

- minhash-cache: 28 tests for LRU cache behavior, memory bounds, eviction
- comparison-engine: 28 tests for genome comparison, quick compare, utilities
- hgt-tracer: 19 tests for HGT provenance analysis, island detection, donors

Total: 75 new tests bringing comparison package to 279 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
